briefs.title: BC Updates Income Assistance Rules for Housing and Care Definitions, Effective December 1
briefs.summary: BC amended its income assistance regulations to update key definitions around housing (tenancy, security deposits, supportive housing) and care, and to change which schedule sections apply to certain recipients. Most changes take effect December 1, 2025.
briefs.action_required: Review how your business interacts with income assistance recipients in housing or care settings before December 1, 2025.

key_dates.label: BC Employment Assistance Regulation housing/care definition changes take effect

briefs.industries: Landlord & Property Mgmt, Healthcare, Labour & Employment
